projects.title: Network Packet Analyzer
projects.description: Python-based packet capture and analysis tool built with Scapy. Captures live network traffic, parses protocol headers, identifies suspicious patterns (port scans, ARP spoofing, unusual payloads), and generates structured JSON/HTML reports. Designed for homelab use on a dedicated monitoring VM.

projects.title: OSINT Reconnaissance Framework
projects.description: Modular Python toolkit for passive reconnaissance. Aggregates WHOIS records, DNS enumeration, certificate transparency log entries, and Shodan data into a structured threat profile. Designed for authorized penetration testing engagements.

projects.title: Log Analysis Automation
projects.description: Bash and Python scripts for automated parsing of syslog, auth.log, and Windows Event Log exports. Detects brute-force attempts, privilege escalation events, and lateral movement indicators using pattern matching and statistical analysis.

projects.title: Security Awareness Training Page
projects.description: Simulated phishing landing page built for internal security awareness training. Demonstrates common social engineering techniques in a controlled environment and educates users on identifying malicious pages. Includes a logging component for the security team.
